profile.name: Abu Raihan Rony
profile.title: Senior Mobile Application Developer
profile.tagline: Leading development of high‑quality Android & cross‑platform apps with Kotlin, Compose, Flutter.

education.title: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Engineering

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer (Android & iOS)
details: Developed and maintained native Android apps using Kotlin, and cross-platform apps for Android and iOS using Kotlin Multiplatform.
Applied Clean Architecture with Dagger Hilt, Koin, Kotlin Coroutines, Flow, and Retrofit, improving scalability, maintainability, and asynchronous data handling.
Led the mobile app development team, managing feature development, architecture decisions, and agile sprint delivery and code quality standards.
Performed regular code reviews, debugging, and performance optimization, collaborating with UI/UX designers, backend engineers, and product managers to deliver high-quality mobile apps.

experience.title: Software Engineer – Android
details: Developed and maintained native Android apps using Java/Kotlin and cross-platform apps for Android and iOS using Flutter.
Engineered complex UI and real-time data synchronization for a large-scale Android application in the health and wellness sector.
Implemented Clean Architecture with Dagger Hilt for dependency injection and Kotlin Coroutines for asynchronous programming, improving code maintainability and scalability.
Led mobile app development teams, consistently delivering projects on schedule and meeting product deadlines.
Collaborated with designers and product managers throughout the development lifecycle to deliver high-quality apps and exceptional user experiences.

experience.title: Android Developer
details: Developed native Android apps using Java/Kotlin and cross-platform apps using Flutter, from specifications and requirements gathering.
Integrated external RESTful APIs and managed adaptive layouts for diverse screen sizes.
Implemented MVVM Architecture utilizing Dagger Hilt and Kotlin Coroutines for structured development.
Introduced new technologies to enhance overall development efficiency.

experience.title: Android Developer (Part‑Time)
details: Developed native Android apps using Java and Kotlin from initial specifications, ensuring robust functionality and performance.
Adapted UI layouts to support various screen sizes and resolutions for a consistent experience across devices.
Integrated third-party libraries, APIs, offline storage (SQLite), threading, and local databases to enhance app capabilities.
Collaborated closely with designers and product managers to deliver intuitive, visually appealing applications.

projects.title: Turner: LiveVoiceTranslator
projects.description: Led end-to-end development of a real-time voice and camera translation app using Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) and Jetpack Compose, achieving 90%+ shared code across Android and iOS. Implemented voice translation, camera OCR, and conversation mode using Google ML Kit. Integrated cross-platform subscription billing via RevenueCat, AdMob, and Firebase Analytics.

projects.title: ImproveType: AI-Powered Keyboard
projects.description: Led end-to-end development of an AI-powered keyboard (IME) supporting 56+ languages, built with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, MVVM, and Clean Architecture using a multi-module architecture. Developed AI text suggestions, grammar correction, voice input, clipboard history, and dynamic keyboard layouts. Integrated Google Play Billing, AdMob, Firebase, and optimized with baseline profiles and ProGuard/R8.

projects.title: Genofax
projects.description: Developed and maintained a dual-platform health application for Android and iOS focusing on health assessment and well-being tracking. Led Android development using Kotlin, XML, and MVVM architecture with Dagger Hilt for dependency injection and Kotlin Coroutines. Managed iOS development with Flutter, Dart, MVC, and GetX for state management.

projects.title: DogPro – Dog Profiling
projects.description: Android app for dog breed classification and profiling. Enhanced performance, integrated image recognition using ML, and improved API communication via Retrofit and Kotlin Coroutines for a smooth user experience.

projects.title: Amar Arabi Ovidhan
projects.description: Rebuilt and modernized an Android Arabic dictionary app with an enhanced UI. Implemented user authentication, word list browsing, search functionality, and bookmark management. Enabled offline access via Room database.

projects.title: Prime Bazar – E-commerce App
projects.description: Contributed to the development of an e-commerce application using Flutter. Optimized codebase for improved performance and maintainability. Added new features, updated UI elements, and resolved bugs to enhance the shopping experience.

projects.title: SB-Live – Live Stream Video Chat
projects.description: Developed an Android social platform for real-time live streaming and video chat from scratch. Enabled user broadcasting, connection, and engagement through virtual gifts. Integrated Agora SDK for live streaming, Firebase Authentication, and Firebase Realtime Database for data syncing.

projects.title: Talent Torrent
projects.description: Technology-based remote work platform connecting talent and businesses globally. Optimized performance, integrated Stripe payment gateway, and maintained scalable architecture for smooth remote collaboration.

projects.title: Ramadan Calendar
projects.description: Convenient Ramadan companion for Muslims with exact sahri and iftar schedules for all districts of Bangladesh. Features district selection, daily countdown timers, and alarm setting for sahri and iftar.

projects.title: Speak English Online
projects.description: English speaking practice app with anonymous global voice calls — no login required. Provides unlimited free calls with strangers worldwide, helping users improve their English speaking skills from anywhere.

projects.title: Starnote Social
projects.description: Social and learning app with feeds, groups, audio/video calls, live streaming, games, and e-commerce. Features teacher-partner matching, privacy controls, and real-time notifications.

projects.title: Age Calculator
projects.description: Calculates your exact age in years, months, weeks, days, hours, minutes, and seconds. Shows upcoming ten birthdays with a clean, intuitive interface.

projects.title: Alo Blood Donor
projects.description: Blood donor finder app powered by Firebase, enabling users to find nearby blood donors quickly. Features donor registration, district-based listings, and direct contact flow to save lives.

projects.title: Hash Generator
projects.description: Generates SHA-1/224/256/384/512 and MD5 hashes for any text input. Copy hash to clipboard instantly with a clean, minimal interface.

projects.title: Application Landing Website
projects.description: Responsive marketing landing website for mobile applications. Built with Bootstrap for responsive layout and jQuery for interactive elements.

training.title: Android Application Development
training.place: BASIS Institute of Technology & Management Limited (BITM), Dhaka, Bangladesh
